subcodes.first_line: O My Afnán! Upon thee be My glory and My loving-kindness and the mercy of thy Lord, the Compassionate, the All-Bountiful. Verily, He maketh mention of His Own Self through all remembrance [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا افنانی علیک بهائی و عنایتی و رحمة ربک المشفق الکریم انه یذکر نفسه بکل الاذکار
